title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Patanjali Ayurved - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
